# ScreenTranslate — Full Documentation

## What is ScreenTranslate?

ScreenTranslate is a free macOS application that lives in the menu bar and provides instant screen translation. It uses Apple's built-in Vision OCR and Translation frameworks to recognize and translate text from any area of your screen — entirely on-device with no internet required after initial language pack download.

## System Requirements

- macOS 15 Sequoia or later
- Apple Silicon (M1/M2/M3/M4) or Intel Mac
- Screen Recording permission (for screen capture)

## Supported Languages (18)

Auto-detect source language is supported. Translation pairs are powered by Apple Translation framework:
Arabic, Chinese (Simplified), Chinese (Traditional), Dutch, English, French, German, Hindi, Indonesian, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Polish, Portuguese, Russian, Spanish, Thai, Turkish, Ukrainian, Vietnamese

## Technology Stack

- **OCR**: Apple Vision framework (VNRecognizeTextRequest)
- **Translation**: Apple Translation framework (on-device neural translation)
- **UI**: SwiftUI + AppKit (NSWindow for overlays and popups)
- **Auto-update**: Sparkle framework
- **Keyboard shortcuts**: KeyboardShortcuts library
- **Data persistence**: SwiftData (translation history)

## Privacy

ScreenTranslate processes everything locally on the user's Mac:
- Screen captures are processed in memory and never saved to disk
- OCR text recognition runs via Apple Vision on-device
- Translation runs via Apple Translation on-device
- No analytics, no telemetry, no data collection
- No network requests except for language pack downloads and update checks

## Use Cases

- Reading foreign language content on websites, PDFs, images
- Translating text in applications that don't support copy-paste
- Quick translation while watching videos with foreign subtitles
- Translating text in screenshots or images
- Reading foreign documentation while coding

## Download

- Website: https://screentranslate.filient.ai/
- GitHub: https://github.com/hcmhcs/screenTranslate
